en: "Let not your hearts be troubled. Believe in God; believe also in me.
zh: “你們心裡不要難過，你們應當信 神，也應當信我。

en: In my Father's house are many rooms. If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you?
zh: 在我父的家裡，有許多住的地方；如果沒有，我怎麼會告訴你們我去是要為你們預備地方呢？

en: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again and will take you to myself, that where I am you may be also.
zh: 我若去為你們預備地方，就必再來接你們到我那裡去，好使我在哪裡，你們也在哪裡。

en: And you know the way to where I am going."
zh: 我去的地方，你們知道那條路。”

en: Thomas said to him, "Lord, we do not know where you are going. How can we know the way?"
zh: 多馬說：“主啊，我們不知道你去的地方，怎能知道那條路呢？”

en: Jesus said to him, "I am the way, and the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
zh: 耶穌對他說：“我就是道路、真理、生命，如果不是藉著我，沒有人能到父那裡去。

en: If you had known me, you would have known my Father also. From now on you do know him and have seen him."
zh: 如果你們認識我，就必認識我的父；從今以後，你們認識他，並且看見了他。”

en: Philip said to him, "Lord, show us the Father, and it is enough for us."
zh: 腓力說：“主啊，請把父顯示給我們，我們就滿足了。”

en: Jesus said to him, "Have I been with you so long, and you still do not know me, Philip? Whoever has seen me has seen the Father. How can you say, 'Show us the Father'?
zh: 耶穌說：“腓力，我跟你們在一起這麼久了，你還不認識我嗎？那看見了我的就是看見了父，你怎麼還說‘把父顯示給我們’呢？

en: Do you not believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in me? The words that I say to you I do not speak on my own authority, but the Father who dwells in me does his works.
zh: 你不信我是在父裡面，父是在我裡面嗎？我對你們說的話，不是憑著自己說的，而是住在我裡面的父作他自己的事。

en: Believe me that I am in the Father and the Father is in me, or else believe on account of the works themselves.
zh: 你們應當信我是在父裡面，父是在我裡面；不然，也要因我所作的而相信。

en: "Truly, truly, I say to you, whoever believes in me will also do the works that I do; and greater works than these will he do, because I am going to the Father.
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，我所作的事，信我的人也要作，並且要作比這些更大的，因為我往父那裡去。

en: Whatever you ask in my name, this I will do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
zh: 你們奉我的名無論求甚麼，我必定成全，使父在子的身上得著榮耀。

en: If you ask me anything in my name, I will do it.
zh: 你們若奉我的名向我求甚麼，我必定成全。

en: "If you love me, you will keep my commandments.
zh: “如果你們愛我，就要遵守我的命令。

en: And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Helper, to be with you forever,
zh: 我要請求父，他就會賜給你們另一位保惠師，使他跟你們永遠在一起。

en: even the Spirit of truth, whom the world cannot receive, because it neither sees him nor knows him. You know him, for he dwells with you and will be in you.
zh: 這保惠師就是真理的靈，世人不能接受他，因為看不見他，也不認識他。你們卻認識他，因為他跟你們住在一起，也要在你們裡面。

en: "I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
zh: 我不會撇下你們為孤兒，我要回到你們這裡來。

en: Yet a little while and the world will see me no more, but you will see me. Because I live, you also will live.
zh: 不久以後，世人不再看見我，你們卻要看見我，因為我活著，你們也要活著。

en: In that day you will know that I am in my Father, and you in me, and I in you.
zh: 到那日，你們就知道我是在我父裡面，你們是在我裡面，我也在你們裡面。

en: Whoever has my commandments and keeps them, he it is who loves me. And he who loves me will be loved by my Father, and I will love him and manifest myself to him."
zh: 那領受我的命令，並且遵守的，就是愛我的；愛我的，我父必定愛他，我也要愛他，並且要親自向他顯現。”

en: Judas (not Iscariot) said to him, "Lord, how is it that you will manifest yourself to us, and not to the world?"
zh: 猶大 對耶穌說：“主啊，你為甚麼要親自向我們顯現，不向世人顯現呢？”

en: Jesus answered him, "If anyone loves me, he will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our home with him.
zh: 耶穌回答：“人若愛我，就要遵守我的話，我父必定愛他，並且我們要到他那裡去，跟他住在一起。

en: Whoever does not love me does not keep my words. And the word that you hear is not mine but the Father's who sent me.
zh: 不愛我的，就不會遵守我的話。你們所聽見的道，不是我的，而是那差我來的父的道。

en: "These things I have spoken to you while I am still with you.
zh: “我還跟你們在一起的時候，就對你們講了這些事。

en: But the Helper, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, he will teach you all things and bring to your remembrance all that I have said to you.
zh: 但保惠師，就是父因我的名要差來的聖靈，他要把一切事教導你們，也要使你們想起我對你們所說過的一切話。

en: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you. Not as the world gives do I give to you. Let not your hearts be troubled, neither let them be afraid.
zh: 我留下平安給你們，我把自己的平安賜給你們；我給你們的，不像世界所給的。你們心裡不要難過，也不要恐懼。

en: You heard me say to you, 'I am going away, and I will come to you.' If you loved me, you would have rejoiced, because I am going to the Father, for the Father is greater than I.
zh: 你們聽見我對你們說過：‘我去，但還要回到你們這裡來。’你們若愛我，就要喜樂，因為我到父那裡去，又因為父是比我大的。

en: And now I have told you before it takes place, so that when it does take place you may believe.
zh: 現在事情還沒有發生，我就已經告訴你們，使你們在事情發生的時候可以相信。

en: I will no longer talk much with you, for the ruler of this world is coming. He has no claim on me,
zh: 我不會再跟你們講很多的事，因為這世界的統治者將到；他在我身上毫無作用，

en: but I do as the Father has commanded me, so that the world may know that I love the Father. Rise, let us go from here.
zh: 但這些事是要使世人知道我愛父，並且知道父怎樣吩咐了我，我就怎樣作。起來，我們走吧！”
